reviews.review_msg: Angali was great, I hope she is still teaching somewhere!
Angali is my favorite teacher because she makes you laugh while teaching. My favorite class.
The best class I have taken! Anjali was really helpful and challenging in a good way.

4 years of SFU business and I still haven't seen a teacher as interesting and nice as Anjali.  She is one of my favourite prof's hands down.  Very helpful, super interesting lectures, uses a lot of real life examples to explain textbook concepts.  She was on the honour roll list of Business Professors.
My first marketing class ever and she made it interactive and interesting (plus we got to taste test nacho chips in class). Gave me lots of feedback on my assignments.
